description: A complex full-width block with a background image overlaid with multiple content cards: a stat counter card, a feature/navigation card, and a quick links card. Used to showcase ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) metrics.

layout.structure: Full-width background image + 3 overlaid content cards
layout.containerWidth: Full viewport width with 1330px content constraint

FR-01.title: Background Image
FR-01.description: The block MUST display a full-width background image that provides visual context.
acceptance: Full-width background image (e.g., kids playing soccer)
Image serves as visual context for ESG/sustainability theme

FR-02.title: Stat Counter Card
FR-02.description: The block MUST include an animated stat counter showing a key ESG metric.

FR-03.title: Feature Navigation Card
FR-03.description: The block MUST include a linked card navigating to the ESG detail page.

FR-04.title: Quick Links Card
FR-04.description: The block MUST include a quick links section with downloadable resources.
acceptance: List of links to PDF documents (open in new window)
Each link has external icon indicator

FR-05.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-05.description: Cards MUST stack vertically on mobile, background image remains.
acceptance: Desktop: Cards positioned over background image in a structured layout
Mobile: Cards stack vertically, background may be less prominent or hidden

accessibility.AC-01: Background image MUST have alt text or be marked decorative if purely visual
accessibility.AC-02: PDF download links MUST indicate file type and that they open in new window
accessibility.AC-03: Stat counter final value MUST be in DOM for screen readers
